PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTIN, LARRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOUTHERN, WILLIAM $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $787.45 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,287.45, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR- STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF.
